Text.Page:
Federation Supply is sent to be collected here.

These supplies must be sent to {@Rgn:24013$$Cathedral Redoubt} but we don’t have enough manpower for such delivery.

Could you please ask {@LinkCreature:225#1008$$Jahdami} of {@Rgn:24013$$Cathedral Redoubt} for reinforcements?

I understand {@LinkCreature:225#1006$$Orlaith}’s situation. We are desperate for supplies but we cannot afford to send reinforcements there.

If you can help us here, then perhaps the situation might improve. Please help us and our situation.
